user.title: Google Assistant (Manual)
user.description:
Enter your Google Cloud project ID.

Follow the setup guide at {guide_url} (steps 1–13). You'll paste your service account JSON key in the next step.{yaml_notice}

service_account.title: Service Account
service_account.description:
Paste your service account JSON key file contents.

Create one at {docs_url} (step 12 of the guide at {guide_url}).

data_description.service_account: Paste your downloaded service account JSON key

error.invalid_project_id: Project ID must be 6-30 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens
error.Invalid JSON: The text is not valid JSON
error.Missing 'client_email': The JSON is missing the 'client_email' field
error.Missing 'private_key': The JSON is missing the 'private_key' field

config.yaml_notice: You have a `google_assistant:` section in your configuration.yaml. This integration now manages Google Assistant and overrides it, so you can remove that section.

frontend.yaml_detected: The google_assistant: section was detected in your configuration.yaml and has been disabled. This integration now manages your Google Assistant configuration. You can safely remove the google_assistant: section from your YAML configuration.
frontend.enable_fail_hint: Try reloading the integration from Settings → Devices & Services.
frontend.disable_fail_hint: Try removing the integration from Settings → Devices & Services.
frontend.check_logs: Check Home Assistant logs for details.
frontend.report_state_enable_failed: Failed to enable state reporting. Try toggling the integration off and on, or check Home Assistant logs.
frontend.report_state_disable_failed: Failed to disable state reporting. Try toggling the integration off and on, or check Home Assistant logs.
frontend.ready_banner: {name} is ready — manage it under Settings → Voice assistants.
